revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-420

Application of a thin film of zinc, aluminium, or other suitable metal, over a metal surface (usually steel) using a special spray gun to melt and apply the coating metal to provide corrosion protection.

{{IALAFooter}}
